Lung squamous WES median; smoking signature.
Mesothelioma; low; panel ~1.1-2.

Pancreatic adeno panel median ~2.0-2.4; MSI rare.
Pheo/paraganglioma; very low; among lowest.

Treated as colorectal; MSI-H subset much higher.

Stomach intestinal type; EBV+ / MSI-H subsets much higher.
Testicular germ cell; very low SNV TMB; aneuploidy-driven.
Thyroid papillary; among lowest; single-driver BRAF/RAS.
Thymoma; very low; among lowest in TCGA.
Endometrioid median; POLE-ultramutated and MSI-H subsets very high.
Uterine carcinosarcoma; approx; small cohorts.
Uveal melanoma; lowest median across TCGA; GNAQ/GNA11-driven no UV.
Leiomyosarcoma; complex-karyotype STS; low SNV TMB.
Dedifferentiated liposarcoma; MDM2/CDK4 amplicon-driven; low TMB.
Undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma; among higher STS TMB.
Myxofibrosarcoma ~2 mut/Mb.
Synovial sarcoma; lowest STS TMB; SS18-SSX fusion-driven simple karyotype.
MPNST; panel ~2.5.
Osteosarcoma pediatric WGS ~1.2; high SV/chromothripsis burden.
Ewing sarcoma ~0.6; EWSR1-FLI1 fusion-driven; very few SNVs.
Embryonal RMS; low pediatric TMB; RAS-pathway; subtype median approximate.
Alveolar RMS; PAX3/7-FOXO1 fusion-driven; very low SNV burden; approximate.
Chondrosarcoma; low TMB; IDH1/2-driven.
Chordoma skull-base WGS; brachyury-driven; rare MMR cases hypermutate.
Neuroblastoma ~0.6; relapse higher.
Wilms tumor; very low pediatric TMB; per-entity median approximate.
Rhabdoid tumor ~0.1; SMARCB1-driven near-silent genome.
AT/RT; lowest-mutation pediatric brain tumor; SMARCB1/SMARCA4-driven.
Medulloblastoma ~0.3; rare germline-MMR/POLE hypermutant cases.
Retinoblastoma ~0.085 substitutions/Mb; RB1-loss driven near-silent.
Hepatoblastoma; lowest pediatric TMB; CTNNB1-driven.
Multiple myeloma WES median ~1.6; increases at relapse.
CLL WES median ~0.6; low.
Mantle cell lymphoma WES ~1; approximate per-Mb.
Follicular lymphoma; AID/SHM-driven; no clean published per-Mb median.
Hodgkin; panel TMB inflated vs WES; approximate.
Burkitt; AID/MYC-driven moderate burden; ~2 approximate WES.
B-ALL; very low pediatric TMB; CMMRD/relapse cases far higher.
T-ALL; low; slightly higher than B-ALL; approximate.
MDS ~9 somatic mutations/exome; rises with IPSS risk.
Myeloproliferative neoplasm; driver-defined (JAK2/CALR/MPL); no published per-Mb median.
Chronic myeloid leukemia; BCR-ABL1-defined; very few additional mutations in chronic phase.
CTCL/mycosis fungoides; UV-signature; stage-dependent; advanced much higher.
Pancreatic NET well-diff median ~1.9 (vs NEC ~5.0); low.
Small cell lung; high ~8.6; smoking signature.
Merkel cell carcinoma median ~5.3; bimodal MCPyV-neg(UV) high vs MCPyV-pos low.
Medullary thyroid; single-driver RET/RAS; no clean published per-Mb median.
Adenoid cystic carcinoma ~0.31; MYB-NFIB fusion-driven; very low.
Nasopharyngeal carcinoma median ~0.95-1.0; EBV-driven low SNV burden.
NUT carcinoma; BRD4-NUT fusion-driven near-silent; no well-cited per-Mb median.
